$schema: Allowlist for check-no-silent-rep-clears.mjs. Each entry: file:line that the gate would otherwise flag, with a written reason in `_reasons`. Adding an entry means you've verified the clear is intentional, cannot drop a user's picked value in a real submission flow, and has been reviewed by someone other than the author.

_reasons.app/dashboard/new-deal/page.tsx:269: repId-change effect — blitz availability is rep-scoped, so an old blitz must be cleared when the rep changes. setterId is preserved (validator catches mismatches).
_reasons.app/dashboard/new-deal/page.tsx:1083: Admin's closer picker — the chosen blitz may no longer match the new closer's blitz list. setterId is explicitly NOT cleared (was the regression source). Re-pinned from :1069 (line drift from cycle 1153-1176 edits).
_reasons.app/dashboard/new-deal/page.tsx:1815: Lead-source toggle off `blitz` — the blitz <select> only renders when leadSource === 'blitz', so an orphan blitzId would persist invisibly. setterId preserved. Re-pinned from :1801.
_reasons.app/dashboard/mobile/MobileNewDeal.tsx:3: Mobile equivalent of the desktop :269 repId-change effect. Same rationale.
_reasons.app/dashboard/mobile/MobileNewDeal.tsx:1: Mobile admin Closer (Rep) picker — clears blitzId when the closer changes because blitz availability is rep-scoped; the new closer may not be approved for the prior blitz. setterId is NOT cleared (picker even filters the setter out of closer options). Mobile twin of the desktop :1083 closer-picker clear. Added cycle 1153-1176.
_reasons.app/dashboard/mobile/MobileNewDeal.tsx:2: Mobile lead-source toggle off `blitz`. Same rationale as desktop :1815. Re-pinned from :1982.
_reasons.app/dashboard/mobile/MobileProjectDetail: useState initializer for editDraft — first-render default empty values, not a reactive clear. Gate false-positive (regex matches `setterId: ''` on a line that also has `repId: ''`).
useState initializer for editDraft — first-render default empty values, not a reactive clear. Gate false-positive (matches bare `blitzId: ''`).
